expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: Output references SKILL.md framework detection table and function-templates.md. Structured mapping follows skill process.

expectations.name: modularity_mapped
expectations.text: Modularity mapped to a dependency check tool (dependency-cruiser or similar)
expectations.evidence: Modularity mapped to dependency-cruiser with .dependency-cruiser.cjs config. Run command: 'npx depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs src'.

expectations.name: coverage_mapped
expectations.text: Testability mapped to a coverage tool (jest --coverage or similar)
expectations.evidence: Testability mapped to Jest --coverage with coverageThreshold config (branches: 80, functions: 80, lines: 80). Run command: 'npx jest --coverage'.

expectations.name: performance_mapped
expectations.text: Performance mapped to a load testing tool (autocannon, k6 or similar)
expectations.evidence: Performance mapped to autocannon with p95 latency assertion. Also mentions k6 as alternative. Run command provided in test file.

expectations.name: concrete_commands
expectations.text: Specific run commands provided for each fitness function (not just tool names)
expectations.evidence: All three have concrete commands: 'npx depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs src', 'npx jest --coverage', 'npx jest fitness/performance.test.js'. Also includes implementation code snippets.

expectations.name: thresholds_from_arch
expectations.text: Thresholds come from architecture.md (80% coverage, <500ms) not invented
expectations.evidence: Coverage threshold 80% matches architecture.md '>80% Test Coverage'. Performance threshold 500ms matches architecture.md 'API <500ms p95'. No invented thresholds.
